panels.title: Anomalous Routes Now
panels.description: Routes with is_anomaly=true (z-score signal) in last 15 minutes

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) route_id, is_anomaly, updated_at FROM online_route_features ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t WHERE is_anomaly = true AND updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes'

panels.title: % Routes Anomalous
panels.description: Percentage of active routes currently flagged as anomalous

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN is_anomaly THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) route_id, is_anomaly, updated_at FROM online_route_features ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes'

panels.title: Max |Z-Score| Now
panels.description: Highest absolute z-score across all routes right now

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(MAX(ABS(duration_zscore))::numeric, 2) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) route_id, duration_zscore, updated_at FROM online_route_features ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' AND duration_zscore IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Avg |Z-Score| Now
panels.description: Average absolute z-score — baseline drift indicator

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(ABS(duration_zscore))::numeric, 2) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) route_id, duration_zscore, updated_at FROM online_route_features ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' AND duration_zscore IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Anomalous Route Count Over Time
panels.description: Number of routes with is_anomaly=true per 5-minute window

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', window_start) + INTERVAL '5 min' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM window_start) / 5.0) AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT route_id) FILTER (WHERE is_anomaly = true) AS "Anomalous Routes", COUNT(DISTINCT route_id) AS "Total Active Routes" FROM online_route_features WHERE $__timeFilter(window_start) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Z-Score Intensity Over Time
panels.description: Max and avg absolute z-score across all routes — spike = widespread anomaly

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', window_start) + INTERVAL '5 min' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM window_start) / 5.0) AS time, MAX(ABS(duration_zscore)) AS "Max |z-score|", AVG(ABS(duration_zscore)) AS "Avg |z-score|" FROM online_route_features WHERE $__timeFilter(window_start) AND duration_zscore IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Currently Anomalous Routes
panels.description: Routes with is_anomaly=true right now, ranked by |z-score|

targets.rawSql: SELECT route_id AS "Route", ROUND(duration_zscore::numeric, 2) AS "Z-Score", ROUND(mean_duration_minutes::numeric, 1) AS "Mean Duration (min)", ROUND(last_duration_minutes::numeric, 1) AS "Last Duration (min)", TO_CHAR(updated_at, 'HH24:MI:SS') AS "Updated At" FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) route_id, duration_zscore, mean_duration_minutes, last_duration_minutes, updated_at, is_anomaly FROM online_route_features ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t WHERE is_anomaly = true AND updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' ORDER BY ABS(duration_zscore) DESC NULLS LAST

panels.title: Per-Route Z-Score Over Time
panels.description: Individual route z-scores — hover to identify which route spiked

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', window_start) + INTERVAL '5 min' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM window_start) / 5.0) AS time, route_id AS metric, AVG(duration_zscore) AS value FROM online_route_features WHERE $__timeFilter(window_start) AND duration_zscore IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Ingest Lag Over Time (p50 / p95)
panels.description: End-to-end latency from VietMap API to Postgres — SLO: p95 < 30s

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', window_start) + INTERVAL '5 min' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM window_start) / 5.0) AS time, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY last_ingest_lag_ms) / 1000.0 AS "p50 lag (s)", PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY last_ingest_lag_ms) / 1000.0 AS "p95 lag (s)" FROM online_route_features WHERE $__timeFilter(window_start) AND last_ingest_lag_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: SLO Met (p95 < 30s)
panels.description: Percentage of 5-min windows where p95 lag was under 30s

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN p95_ms < 30000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS value FROM (SELECT date_trunc('hour', window_start) + INTERVAL '5 min' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM window_start) / 5.0) AS bucket, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY last_ingest_lag_ms) AS p95_ms FROM online_route_features WHERE $__timeFilter(window_start) AND last_ingest_lag_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1) t

panels.title: Routes With Z-Score Null
panels.description: Routes with no baseline yet (stddev=0 or baseline missing) — fallback mode

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) route_id, duration_zscore, updated_at FROM online_route_features ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t WHERE duration_zscore IS NULL AND updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes'

panels.title: Baseline Coverage
panels.description: % of active routes with valid z-score (has baseline)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN duration_zscore IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) route_id, duration_zscore, updated_at FROM online_route_features ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes'
